category_sources: Official espressif/esptool repository describes it as a serial utility for flashing, provisioning, and interacting with Espressif SoCs.
source_facts.description identifies esptool as an ESP8266 and ESP32 serial bootloader utility.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is esptool; official Espressif repository and docs use the esptool name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is an official Espressif esptool docs page; the docs root is the dedicated official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official esptool documentation and GitHub results identify github.com/espressif/esptool as the source repository.
tags_sources: Official repository description supports Espressif SoCs and flashing/provisioning tags.
source_facts.description supports ESP8266, ESP32, serial, and bootloader tags.
